data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Provider review and flagging of responses' but failed to provide concrete evidence confirming that this functionality is implemented as required. While the linked use case mentions that the provider reviews submissions and flags them, there is no direct evidence from API reads or persisted state checks to confirm this behavior. This leads to a gap in the requirement satisfaction as the evidence does not demonstrate the actual implementation of the review and flagging process.
gaps: Lack of concrete evidence confirming the implementation of provider review and flagging of responses.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
